defect.reader_effect: The Related Work bridge from proxy metrics to task evidence was semantically right but visually choppy, with a cluster of body-word splits just before the Method opener.

changes.summary: Rewrote the proxy-metrics paragraph into shorter ACL-style sentences.

Preserved the evidence boundary: SSIM/LPIPS/CLIP/DINOv2 remain proxy checks, while answer stability, point hits, frame checks, material-risk bins, and embodied stack checks remain separate claim gates.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Pages 2-4 show no remaining page-3 target-cluster splits after the accepted rewrite; page 2 retains unrelated literal compound breaks from earlier content.
after_evidence.visual_result: Page 3 Related Work and Method remain stable; the proxy paragraph reads as a compact bridge into the four-gate method.

claim_boundary: Related Work prose and linebreak polish only. No metric values, evidence pools, figures, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: The full-page scan still reports unrelated page-2 literal compound breaks and normal reference-column hyphenation; this round intentionally scoped to the page-3 proxy paragraph cluster.
